text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm Biwa Hayahide. We'll be seeing a lot of each
other from now on, so let's make an effort to get
to know one another.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My goal is to devise the perfect winning equation.
I expect that I'll require your assistance in proving
my theories.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which, I do have some theories I'd
like to test now. Are you ready, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
